topic: Sleep apnea damages every organ in your body
caption: Did you know sleep apnea silently damages EVERY organ in your body? 🌙💤 It's not just about sleep quality; it's about your overall health. Here are the facts: Sleep apnea can increase your risk of heart disease by 30%, lead to a 60% higher chance of developing type 2 diabetes, and even affect your brain's cognitive function. 🧠💡 Save this so you don't lose it. Share with someone who needs to see this. Follow @healthrecode for daily science-backed health. Don't forget — your future body will thank you. 💕 #SleepApnea #HealthRisks #OrganDamage #SleepIsKey #Wellness #MedicalFacts #HealthEducation #SleepDisorders
